decider_result.reason: Selected IDs based on highest risk hints and negative activity trends.

failure_modes: Overlooking citizens with lower risk hints but significant negative trends.
Misinterpreting activity and sleep data due to external factors.
Insufficient budget leading to inadequate candidate evaluation.
guardrails: Ensure that the highest risk hints are prioritized.
Cross-validate activity and sleep metrics with external health indicators.
Limit candidate selection to the top 5 based on defined criteria.
planner_result.strategy: Identify citizens with suboptimal well-being trajectories based on risk hints and activity metrics. Prioritize those with the highest risk hints and negative activity trends.
